ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "relationship_status" INTEGER /* Current relationship status of the user */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* Industry the user belongs to */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* Preferred genre of the user */,
  "targeted_sex" INTEGER /* Targeted sex of the user */,
  "average_runtime" INTEGER /* Average runtime per week in minutes */,
  "airtime" INTEGER /* Airtime of the user */,
  "airlocation" INTEGER /* Airlocation of the user */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Ratings given by other users */,
  "expensive" INTEGER /* Whether the user has an expensive membership */,
  "money_back_guarantee" INTEGER /* Whether the user has a money-back guarantee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_relationship_status FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_status") REFERENCES relationship_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "user_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the match */,
  "user_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was made */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., active, inactive, successful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_user_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_user_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the interaction */,
  "user_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., message, video call, like) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exhibiting the behavior */,
  "behavior_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior */,
  "behavior_value" TEXT /* Value of the behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match with the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Value of the outcome (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "user_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the message */,
  "user_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date when the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_calls" (
  "video_call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video call */,
  "user_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the video call */,
  "user_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the video call */,
  "video_call_date" TEXT /* Date when the video call occurred */,
  "video_call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video call in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_calls_user_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id2") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_calls_user_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id1") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
